label: B2B SaaS
description: Landing page templates for B2B SaaS products. Each template is a standalone Next.js (App Router) + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS project — clone, npm install, and run.

templates.name: PulseMetrics — Analytics Platform
templates.description: Product analytics landing page: dashboard hero mockup, funnels, retention, revenue analytics positioning.

templates.name: DealFlow — CRM & Sales Pipeline
templates.description: CRM and sales pipeline landing page for B2B sales teams: pipeline management, sequences, forecasting.

templates.name: TaskPilot — Project Management
templates.description: Project management landing page for product & engineering teams: boards, sprints, roadmaps, automations.

templates.name: BrightWave — Marketing Automation
templates.description: Marketing automation landing page for growth teams: campaigns, lead scoring, journeys, A/B testing.

templates.name: UptimeCloud — DevOps Monitoring
templates.description: Monitoring & observability landing page for DevOps/SRE teams: uptime, logs, traces, alerting.

templates.name: PeopleHub — HR & People Ops
templates.description: HR & people operations landing page: onboarding, time off, performance reviews, payroll sync.

templates.name: InvoiceFlow — Billing & Invoicing
templates.description: Billing & invoicing landing page for finance teams: invoices, subscriptions, dunning, payments.

templates.name: SupportDesk — Customer Support
templates.description: Helpdesk landing page for support teams: shared inbox, live chat, knowledge base, SLAs.

templates.name: ShieldOps — Security & Compliance
templates.description: Security & compliance landing page: threat detection, SOC 2/ISO automation, audit logs.

templates.name: NeuralWorks — AI Workflow Automation
templates.description: AI workflow automation landing page: visual builder, AI agents, integrations, approvals.
